name: Mediate
tagline: Two people, one LLM in the middle — never speaking directly
description: Start a mediated chat and share an anonymous invite link. Each message is rewritten by an LLM before the other person sees it. Optionally set a mediation goal so the model steers the conversation toward it.

other: optional WebLLM on-device mediation in the browser

env_vars.description: OpenAI API key for the mediator model
Flask session signing secret (generate a long random string)
Public base URL for invite links, e.g. https://mediate.6cubed.app
